name: Diazepam
description: benzodiazepine na-arụ ọrụ ogologo oge. A na-eji ya maka njikwa ọdịdọ, spasm muscle, na anxiolysis. Gel rectal (Diastat) bara uru na ntọala ubi mgbe IV adịghị. Ogologo oge karịa lorazepam.
indications: Ọkpụkpụ akwara site na ọnya azụ azụ ma ọ bụ tetanus
Mgbochi ọgwụ mgbochi akwara (na ngwa CHEMPACK)
dose: Njide: 5-10 mg IV ngwa ngwa push. Tinyegharịa q10-15 min (max 30 mg). Mkpịsị aka: 0.2-0.5 mg / kg. IM absorption na-adịghị agbanwe agbanwe -- zere IM ma ọ ga-ekwe omume.
warnings: Ntinye IM adịghị agbanwe agbanwe ma na-egbu mgbu --ahọrọ IV, rectal, ma ọ bụ jiri midazolam IM kama.
Ogologo oge nkwụsịtụ (24-48h maka usoro ugboro ugboro).
Ndị merụrụ ahụ akwara: diazepam gụnyere na ngwa CHEMPACK maka ọdịdọ site na nsogbu cholinergic.

pediatric.dose: IV: 0.1-0.3 mg/kg (kacha 10 mg). Mkpịsị aka: 0.3-0.5 mg/kg. Jiri ụzọ rectal mgbe IV adịghị.
pediatric.note: Gel diastat rectal bara uru karịsịa maka ọdịdọ ụmụaka na ntọala ubi.

obstetric.note: Na-agafe placenta. Enwere ike ibute hypotonia nke nwa ọhụrụ, ịda mbà n'obi nke iku ume. Jiri naanị maka ọdịdọ nne na-anabataghị magnesium.

source: JTS CPG / CHEMPACK Program / Standard Seizure Management
